zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Hawes於1590年出生在英國時，她的父親Robert Hawes31歲，母親Frances Edwards31歲。她於1613年3月4日與Humphrey Barrett在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1663年8月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年73歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Hawes于1590年出生在英国时，她的父亲Robert Hawes31岁，母亲Frances Edwards31岁。她于1613年3月4日与Humphrey Barrett在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1663年8月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年73岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德。

nameMeanings.name: Hawes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: of Norman origin, from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English Haueis, Hawis, from an Old French form of the ancient Germanic female personal name Hadewidis (from had- ‘war’ + wid- with a range of possible original meanings).
variant of Haw , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Haw
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Haw(e) which, like Daw(e), was probably a rhyming pet form of Middle English Raw (Ralph). Similar rhyming pet forms of other Anglo-Norman male personal names beginning with R- are found in Hick and Dick for Rick (Richard) and Hob and Dob for Rob(ert). See also Hawkin .
English: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from Middle English hawe ‘enclosure’ (Old English haga or Old Norse hagi). Compare Haugh .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何 and 賀, see   He   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Hawes was born in 1590, in England, her father, Robert Hawes, was 31 and her mother, Frances Edwards, was 31. She married Humphrey Barrett on 4 March 1613, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 15 August 1663, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73, and was buried in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Hawes est née en 1590, à Angleterre, son père, Robert Hawes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Frances Edwards, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey Barrett le 4 mars 1613, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 août 1663, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Hawes 1590 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Hawes 31 und ihre Mutter Frances Edwards 31. Sie hat am 4. März 1613 in England Humphrey Barrett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. August 1663 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Hawes è nata il nel 1590 nel England, sua padre, Robert Hawes, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Frances Edwards, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey Barrett il 4 marzo 1613, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 agosto 1663, nel Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Hawesが1590年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Robert Hawesは31歳，母Frances Edwardsは31歳であった。1613年3月4日にイギリスでHumphrey Barrettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1663年8月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドで73歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Hawes(이)가 1590년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hawes(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Frances Edwards(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1613년 3월 4일 영국에서 Humphrey Barrett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1663년 8월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Hawes nasceu em 1590, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Hawes, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Frances Edwards, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey Barrett em 4 de março de 1613, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1663, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Hawes родилась в 1590 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Hawes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Frances Edwards, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Barrett 4 марта 1613 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 августа 1663 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Hawes nació en 1590, en Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Hawes, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Frances Edwards, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Humphrey Barrett el 4 de marzo de 1613, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1663, en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
